creator: michael.osipov@siemens.com
text:
When CA_BUNDLE is disabled curl -- thus --with-ca-fallback is passed, unfortunately, tries to locate a CA certs store automatically and finds one on FreeBSD. This defeats the purpose of using the default store of the underlying OpenSSL installation.

I have raised this question on the curl mailing list: https://curl.se/mail/archive-2023-08/0011.html

The lines:
> 153 .if !${PORT_OPTIONS:MCA_BUNDLE} && (${PORT_OPTIONS:MGNUTLS} || ${PORT_OPTIONS:MOPENSSL})
> 154 CONFIGURE_ARGS+=--with-ca-fallback
> 155 .endif

need to be changed to:
> 153 .if !${PORT_OPTIONS:MCA_BUNDLE} && (${PORT_OPTIONS:MGNUTLS} || ${PORT_OPTIONS:MOPENSSL})
> 154 CONFIGURE_ARGS+=--with-ca-fallback --without-ca-path --without-ca-bundle
> 155 .endif

I can create a patch for this.
